General.Name: China Industrial Securities International Financial Group Ltd
General.Description: China Industrial Securities International Financial Group Limited provides a range of financial services in Hong Kong. The company operates through Wealth Management, Corporate Finance, Asset Management, Financial Products and Investments, and Others segments. It engages in the provision of securities, futures, options, and insurance brokerage services; margin financing services; fund management, discretionary account management, and investment advisory services; and investment holding platforms and management of general working capital services. The company also provides proprietary trading and investment of funds, debt and equity securities, derivatives, fixed income, and other financial products; and corporate advisory, sponsorship, placing and underwriting services of debt and securities, and structured products arrangement services. In addition, it offers fixed income services, such as debt capital market and structured financing; corporate finance services, including IPO sponsorship, equity capital markets, and financial advsiory; and institutional products and services comprising trading, research, and tailored services. The company was incorporated in 2015 and is based in Sheung Wan, Hong Kong. China Industrial Securities International Financial Group Limited operates as a subsidiary of Industrial Securities (HK) Financial Holdings Limited.
General.Address: Infinitus Plaza, Sheung Wan, Hong Kong
